Sections.Name: RPGMaker
Sections.Description: Settings for the RPG Maker games folder. Copy your RPG Maker MV/MZ/VX Ace game folders into the games location below, then Rescan.

Options.Label: Games Location
Options.Description: Where your RPG Maker game folders live. Games are scanned from Games/RPGMaker/ under this location.

Sections.Name: SteamGridDB
Sections.Description: SteamGridDB artwork fallback. Fills missing game artwork from SteamGridDB.

Options.Label: API Key
Options.Description: Your SteamGridDB API key. Get one free at steamgriddb.com/profile/preferences/api
